calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Kenneth Chun, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Chloe Jia Ying Chun, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner: Kaishan Sun, but signed the Petition consented to the name change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Chloe Mei Zhen Chun.
Decree signed in open court.
